2023 Subway Paid Ridership vs Final Estimate

tool_args.label: Results are Preliminary and Subject to Audit

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the actual amounts do not include post-close adjustments, which will be included in the Final audited YE statements.

tool_args.label: NYCT 2023 Financial Performance vs Final Estimate

payload.claim_text: MTA New York City Transit's financial performance compared to the 2023 Final Estimate was favorable.

tool_args.label: NYCT 2023 Financial Performance vs Adopted Budget

payload.claim_text: MTA New York City Transit's financial performance compared to the 2023 Adopted Budget was favorable by $582.7 million.

tool_args.label: 2023 Farebox Revenue Lower Due to Lower Paid Ridership

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenue was lower than projected due to lower paid ridership

Vacancies were primarily in Subways/Bus Maintenance (1,703 positions) and Subways/Bus Operations (475 positions). There were also vacancies in Construction and Development of 386 or 31%, and administrative functions of 312 positions or 32%.

tool_args.label: Overtime Unfavorable Due to Absentee/Vacancy Coverage

payload.claim_text: Overtime was $231.5 million or 46.9% unfavorable to the Adopted Budget, reflecting higher than projected absenteeism and vacancy coverage needs, additional maintenance requirements, scheduled and unscheduled service, as well as weather-related emergencies.

payload.description: 2023 Year-End Report published by MTA New York City Transit
